features.name: continuous assignment to output wire with mixed bitwise expression
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment to an output wire where the right-hand side combines an input wire with module output wires using bitwise AND and OR operators

features.name: output wire assignment versus registered assignment discrepancy
features.description: Code should include both an output wire with continuous assignment and a reg with clocked always block that compute the same expression, where the wire assignment fails but the reg assignment succeeds
